title: EcoBag - 100 Pack Scented Doggy Bags - Vanilla Scented - 10 Microns - Leak Resistant, Recyclable, Heavy Duty Pet Waste Bags - Eco-Friendly & Durable for Daily Use (260 x 340 mm)
features: Eco-Friendly Material: Crafted from recyclable materials, our biodegradable dog poop bags are an excellent choice for environmentally conscious pet owners. These compostable dog poop bags actively contribute to waste reduction and promote recycling, making them perfect for those looking for poo bags biodegradable.

Built to Withstand Heavy Loads: Without tearing or puncturing, these heavy-duty scented doggy bags offer reliable performance for daily use, ensuring durability even for larger dog breeds. Sized at 260 x 340 mm, these large dog poop bags are perfect for handling all types of pet waste.

Extra Leak Resistant:Engineered with superior leak resistance, these dog poop bags effectively prevent unwanted spills and leaks. Ideal for managing pet waste and keeping your environment clean and mess-free, these dog poop bags with tie handles are a must-have.

Convenient & Pleasant: Infused with a light vanilla scent, these dog bag options help neutralize odors, making waste disposal a more pleasant experience. The easy tie handles ensure quick and hygienic sealing, making these dog poo bags biodegradable tie handles a convenient choice.

Convenient Packaging: Each pack includes 100 scented doggy bags. This provides a substantial supply for your pet waste disposal needs, offering great value and convenience for continuous use. Perfect for on-the-go pet owners, these dog bags poop ensure you are always prepared.
